title: Geopolitical escalation drives oil above $95 — systemic risk rising
text: Iran-linked geopolitical tensions intensifying. Oil prices approaching $100 threshold. Structural inflation risk re-emerging across commodity markets. Risk assets under pressure.

title: Institutional deleveraging accelerates on Iran oil shock
text: Geopolitical uncertainty triggering broad risk-off rotation. Iran sanctions escalation driving oil volatility. Capital flight from risk assets accelerating. Inflation expectations rising.

title: Oil and geopolitical convergence signals sustained risk-off regime
text: Confluence of oil supply disruption and geopolitical deterioration. Iran-driven inflation shock risk elevated. Structural risk-off environment developing across macro assets.
